---
title: "Robotic Systems Laboratory"
subtitle: "Course Website Demo"
---

Lecturer: [Yonghyeon Lee](https://www.gabe-yhlee.com)

## Syllabus

This course introduces core topics in robotic systems, starting from software
architecture and simulation, then moving through robot modeling, planning, and
control, and finally covering sensing and perception for integrated
robotic autonomy.

### Lecture Schedule

| Date | Week | Lecture | Notes | Slides |
|---|---|---|---|---|
|  | Week 1 | Lecture 01: Course Introduction | [Notes](notes/01-welcome.qmd) | [Slides](slides/01-welcome.qmd) |
|  | Week 1 | Lecture 02: Physics Simulation | | |
|  | Week 2 | Lecture 03: LCM Communication | | |
|  | Week 3 | Lecture 04: Gravity Compensation | | |
|  | Week 4 | Lecture 05: Robot Collision Geometry Modeling | | |
|  | Week 5 | Lecture 06: Artificial Potential Fields | | |
|  | Week 6 | Lecture 07: Motion Planning and Trajectory Tracking | | |
|  | Week 7 | Lecture 08: Operational Space Impedance Control | | |
|  | Week 8 | Lecture 09: Velocity Field Control | | |
|  | Week 9 | Lecture 10: Camera Calibration | | |
|  | Week 10 | Lecture 11: Signed Distance Field Construction | | |
|  | Week 11 | Lecture 12: Visual Servoing | | |
|  | Week 12 | Lecture 13: Robotic Grasping | | |
|  | Week 13~16 | Final Projects | | |

Full notes index: [Lecture Notes](notes/index.qmd).
